# Room to Expand

> Room to Expand is Sean Paul Denny's Pantarei somatic bodywork practice in Berlin, Germany. Sessions combine conversation and hands-on touch, described in plain language for people who are curious but not yet convinced. Sean is a student practitioner of the Pantarei Approach, the somatic method founded in Berlin in 2016.

Room to Expand is not affiliated with the Room To Expand Festival at the Universität der Künste Berlin, and not affiliated with any construction or remodeling company.

## Key facts

- Practitioner: Sean Paul Denny, student practitioner of the Pantarei Approach
- Location: Neukölln, Berlin, Germany, near Schönleinstraße
- Languages: English
- Background: twenty years in the games industry before training in somatic bodywork
- Pantarei is not therapy and sessions do not diagnose or treat medical or psychological conditions

## Pages

- [What is the Pantarei Approach](https://roomtoexpand.me/what-is-pantarei): plain-language explainer of the method
- [FAQ](https://roomtoexpand.me/faq): direct answers about sessions, the method, and what student practitioner means
- [What to expect in a session](https://roomtoexpand.me/sessions): how a session works, start to finish
- [Testimonials](https://roomtoexpand.me/testimonials): what people say about their sessions
- [Blog](https://roomtoexpand.me/blog): writing on the body, the work, and what somatic practice is like
- [The Box](https://roomtoexpand.me/the-box): a personal story about somatic work and learning to take up space
- [Contact](https://roomtoexpand.me/#book): how to get in touch

## Contact

- Email: seanpauldenny@gmail.com
